elements.label: Create
elements.hint: Purple gradient button inside leftmost card on welcome screen

elements.label: Explore
elements.hint: Cyan gradient button inside center card on welcome screen

elements.label: Import
elements.hint: Pink gradient button inside rightmost card on welcome screen

elements.label: Open
elements.position: bottom section after 'Already have a project?' text
elements.hint: Blue link text after 'Already have a project?'

elements.label: Create Integration
elements.hint: Primary colored button at bottom right. Label changes to 'Create Workspace' when workspace mode is on.

fields.label: Integration Name
fields.screen_position: First field at top of form
fields.note: AUTO-FOCUSED on screen load — user can type immediately without clicking

fields.label: Package Name
fields.note: Auto-populated from Integration Name. Pattern: lowercase a-z, 0-9, underscore, dot only. No consecutive underscores or dots.
fields.helper_text: This will be used as the Ballerina package name for the integration.

fields.label: Select Path
fields.placeholder: Enter path or browse to select a folder...
fields.screen_position: Third field group with Browse button alongside
fields.note: Auto-populated with workspace root path on mount. Has 'Browse' button to the right.

fields.label: Create a new folder using
fields.note: Checked by default. Label says 'Create a new folder using the [workspace name | package name]'

fields.label: Create as workspace
fields.note: Must first click 'Project Structure' header to expand. Only visible if workspace is supported.
fields.helper_text: Include this integration in a new workspace for multi-project management.

fields.label: Workspace Name
fields.screen_position: Inside Project Structure section, appears below 'Create as workspace' checkbox when checked
fields.note: Only appears when 'Create as workspace' is checked
fields.condition: Create as workspace checkbox is checked

fields.label: Standard Integration (Default)
fields.screen_position: Inside Project Structure section, first radio option
fields.helper_text: A deployable project that can be built, tested, and deployed as an integration.
fields.condition: Create as workspace checkbox is checked

fields.label: Library Project
fields.screen_position: Inside Project Structure section, second radio option
fields.helper_text: Shared logic and utilities that can be reused across multiple projects in the workspace.
fields.condition: Create as workspace checkbox is checked

fields.label: Organization Name
fields.screen_position: Inside expanded 'Package Information' collapsible section, first field
fields.note: Must first click 'Package Information' header to expand
fields.helper_text: The organization that owns this Ballerina package.

fields.label: Package Version
fields.screen_position: Inside 'Package Information' section, below Organization Name

mi_creation.name: Create MI Integration Screen
mi_creation.trigger: Selecting 'WSO2: MI' from Type dropdown on creation view

elements.label: Create Integration
elements.action: Create MI project. Shows 'Creating' with spinner while saving.

fields.label: Integration Name
fields.note: No autoFocus. Must click to focus. Validation: alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only. Auto-populates Artifact Id.

fields.label: WSO2 Integrator: MI runtime version
fields.note: Pre-filled with latest supported MI version. Options fetched from API.

fields.label: Group Id
fields.note: Pre-filled with 'com.microintegrator.projects'. Inside collapsible Advanced Options.

fields.label: Artifact Id
fields.note: Auto-populated and kept in sync with Integration Name via react-hook-form watch().

fields.label: Version
fields.note: Pre-filled with '1.0.0'.

import_step1.name: Import Integration - Step 1: Select Source Project

fields.label: Project Folder
fields.placeholder: Enter path or browse to select your project folder...
fields.screen_position: Below platform selection cards, only visible after selecting a platform
fields.note: Only appears after selecting a platform card. Has 'Browse' button.
fields.condition: A platform card (e.g. MuleSoft) is selected

fields.label: Dynamic Parameters
fields.note: Dynamic fields based on selected platform's configuration parameters.

configure_project_single.name: Configure Project (Single - Post Migration)
configure_project_single.note: Reuses the same ProjectFormFields as bi_creation screen

fields.label: Integration Name
fields.note: AUTO-FOCUSED — same behavior as BI creation form

fields.label: Select Path
fields.placeholder: Enter path or browse to select a folder...

fields.label: Select Path
fields.placeholder: Enter path or browse to select a folder...

fields.label: Create a new folder for the packages
fields.note: Checked by default

fields.label: Folder Name
fields.screen_position: Below checkbox, only visible when checkbox is checked
fields.note: AUTO-FOCUSED when it appears (after checkbox is checked). User can type immediately.
fields.helper_text: This folder will contain all migrated packages from this integration.
fields.condition: 'Create a new folder for the packages' checkbox is checked

elements.label: Local Project
elements.hint: Large card with folder icon for local project selection

elements.label: Cloud project
elements.hint: Large card with cloud icon for Choreo/Devant project selection

cloud_project_list.name: Cloud Project List
cloud_project_list.trigger: Selecting 'Cloud project' from Open choice screen

elements.label: Org Switcher
elements.hint: Circular avatar/initials dropdown in the header row

elements.label: Project Row
elements.hint: Iterative row with project icon, name, and description

clone_project_confirmation.name: Clone Project Confirmation
clone_project_confirmation.trigger: Selecting a project from the cloud list

elements.label: Clone Project
elements.hint: Primary button in the confirmation panel

bi_project_creation_new.name: Create BI Project Screen (Workspace Mode)
bi_project_creation_new.trigger: Selecting 'Create Project' from welcome or navigation
bi_project_creation_new.note: Wait 300ms for expansion animation to settle if 'Create within a project' is checked.

fields.label: Project Name
fields.hint: Visible only when 'Create within a project' is checked

bi_library_creation.name: Create Library (BI)
bi_library_creation.trigger: Selecting 'Create Library' from welcome or navigation

fields.label: Project Name
fields.condition: Create within a project is checked

user_account_popover.name: User Account Popover
user_account_popover.trigger: Clicking the user avatar/initials in header

elements.label: Sign Out
elements.hint: Red icon button next to user email

elements.label: Deploy
elements.hint: Primary button. Label may be 'Deploy All' for multiple integrations.

elements.label: Edit Name
elements.hint: Stylized ✎ icon in the integration list row

fields.label: Integration Name
fields.note: Click to edit if needed. Field appears inline when ✎ is clicked.

fields.label: Path
fields.note: Sub-directory path in the repository

fields.label: Organization
fields.hint: Git organization/workspace selector for new repositories

action_config.name: Action Configuration Dialog
action_config.trigger: Clicking a node in the flow canvas

fields.label: Url
fields.note: Has 'Text/Expression' toggle. Anchored to sub-label below it.

element_hints.Create: Purple gradient button inside leftmost card on welcome screen, or primary submit button on creation form
element_hints.Explore: Cyan gradient button inside center card on welcome screen
element_hints.Import: Pink gradient button inside rightmost card on welcome screen
element_hints.Browse: Small secondary button to the right of any path/directory input field
element_hints.Back: Icon button at top-left of any non-welcome screen (arrow icon) OR secondary button at bottom of forms
element_hints.Create Integration: Primary colored submit button at bottom-right of the BI creation form
element_hints.Create Workspace: Same position as 'Create Integration', shown when workspace mode enabled
element_hints.Start Migration: Primary button at bottom of import form step 1
element_hints.Next: Primary button at bottom of migration status screen
element_hints.Create and Open Project: Primary button at bottom of configure project screen
element_hints.Download: Button at bottom of each sample card in the samples grid
element_hints.Configure: Settings gear icon button at top-right of welcome screen
element_hints.Open: Blue link text after 'Already have a project?' on welcome screen
element_hints.View all: Blue link text next to 'Recent projects' header
element_hints.Integration Name: First text input field, auto-focused on BI creation and configure project screens. Click to focus on MI form.
element_hints.Package Name: Second text input, auto-populated from Integration Name. Below Integration Name.
element_hints.Select Path: Directory selector label above the path input + Browse button combo. Has placeholder 'Enter path or browse to select a folder...'
element_hints.Project Structure: Collapsible section header with folder icon, in optional config area. Click to expand.
element_hints.Package Information: Collapsible section header with package icon, below Project Structure. Click to expand.
element_hints.Create as workspace: Checkbox inside expanded Project Structure section
element_hints.Workspace Name: Text field with placeholder 'Enter workspace name', appears after checking 'Create as workspace'
element_hints.Standard Integration (Default): First radio button in Project Type selector inside Project Structure section
element_hints.Library Project: Second radio button in Project Type selector inside Project Structure section
element_hints.Organization Name: Text field inside Package Information section, no placeholder
element_hints.Package Version: Text field inside Package Information section, placeholder '0.1.0'
element_hints.WSO2 Integrator: MI runtime version: Dropdown in MI creation form, auto-filled with latest version
element_hints.Group Id: Text field in MI Advanced Options, default 'com.microintegrator.projects'
element_hints.Artifact Id: Text field in MI Advanced Options, auto-populated from Integration Name
element_hints.Version: Text field in MI Advanced Options, default '1.0.0'
element_hints.Folder Name: Text field in multi-project configure form, placeholder 'Enter folder name', auto-focused when visible
element_hints.Add Artifact: Button in the design canvas view after a project is created. Usually prominent in the center or top of the canvas.
element_hints.Automation: Card/option inside the Add Artifact picker panel. Appears as a grid card labelled 'Automation' in the center of the screen. Has a blue icon or blue-highlighted background. Do NOT match text in the file tree or breadcrumbs.
element_hints.HTTP Service: Card/option inside the Add Artifact picker panel. Appears as a grid card labelled 'HTTP Service' in the center of the screen.
element_hints.API: Card/option inside the Add Artifact picker panel. Appears as a grid card labelled 'API' in the center of the screen.
element_hints.Add Resources: Blue button labeled '+ Add Resources' in the HTTP service design view. Located above or near the resource list area. Has a plus (+) icon prefix.
element_hints.+ Add Resources: Blue button labeled '+ Add Resources' in the HTTP service design view. Located above or near the resource list area.
element_hints.Resource Path: Text input field in the Add Resource dialog for the URL path segment e.g. /greeting. Usually auto-focused when the dialog opens.
element_hints.HTTP Service: Card/option inside the artifact picker dialog, under 'Integration as API' section.
element_hints.Service Base Path: Text input field in the HTTP Service creation form. Has a pre-filled '/'. Click the input to focus it, select all to remove '/', then paste the new value.
element_hints.Listener port: Text input field in HTTP Service creation form for the port number e.g. 9090.
element_hints.Service contract: Dropdown in HTTP Service creation form. Default option visible is 'Design from scratch'.
element_hints.Design from scratch: Option in the Service contract dropdown inside HTTP Service creation form.
element_hints.GET: Resource type button or badge in the HTTP service design view. Represents an HTTP GET method resource.
element_hints.Call Function: Card/option in the node panel inside the automation diagram view. Labeled 'Call Function'. Located in the center grid of the panel.
element_hints.Println: Card/option in the node panel inside the automation diagram view. Labeled 'Println'. May be read by OCR as 'Print' or 'Print ln'. Used for terminal output.
element_hints.Initialize Array: Card/option in the node panel inside the automation diagram view. Labeled 'Initialize Array'. Used for creating data arrays.

Execute Cell.note: Find the text '[ ]' on screen via OCR, move mouse to it, move up 10px, click.

Values.label: Values
Values.hint: Text input field inside the Initialize Array action dialog. Found below or to the right of the 'Values' label.
Values.note: In Light Mode, the field border might be faint. Using lower Canny thresholds.

element_hints.+: Small circular plus button inside the resource flow in design view. Adds a new node to the integration flow.
element_hints.HTTP: Connection type card in the connection picker dialog. Click to create a new HTTP connection.
element_hints.Base URL: Text input field in the new HTTP connection dialog. Enter the full external base URL here.
element_hints.Connection Name: Text input field in the connection dialog for naming the connection e.g. externalApi.
element_hints.Save: Primary submit/save button in dialogs such as connection dialog, action dialog, and resource dialog.
element_hints.get: Action option in the connection action picker. Represents the HTTP GET action to call.
element_hints.Response Variable: Text input field in the action configuration dialog. Located to the RIGHT of the 'Response Variable' label. Used for naming the result variable e.g. response.
element_hints.Response Type: Dropdown selector in the action configuration dialog. Located to the RIGHT of the 'Response Type' label. Used for setting the response data type e.g. json.
element_hints.Response Variable: Text input field in the action configuration dialog for naming the result variable e.g. response.
element_hints.Response Type: Dropdown in the action configuration dialog for setting the response data type e.g. json.
element_hints.json: Option in the Response Type dropdown inside action configuration dialog.
element_hints.Return: Node type button in the flow editor toolbar or add-node menu. Adds a return/response node to the flow.
element_hints.Type:: Inline dropdown at the top of the creation form showing current project type (WSO2: BI or WSO2: MI) with a chevron icon.
element_hints.WSO2: BI: Option in the Type: dropdown selector at the top of the creation form. Selects Ballerina Integration type.
element_hints.WSO2: MI: Option in the Type: dropdown selector at the top of the creation form. Selects Micro Integrator type.
element_hints.Select Integration Path: Directory selector in the MI creation form (same as Select Path on BI form). Has a 'Select Path' browse button.

Url.label: Url
Url.note: Smart input field in action configuration. Features a 'Text/Expression' toggle. The input box is the large rectangular area BELOW the 'URL of the target service' sub-label.

Url*.label: Url*
Url*.note: Same as 'Url' field. The asterisk indicates it is required.

element_hints.Local Project: Large choice card with a circular folder icon in the Open Project landing view
element_hints.Cloud project: Large choice card with a circular cloud icon in the Open Project landing view
element_hints.Clone Project: Primary colored button in the cloud project confirmation screen
element_hints.Back to project list: Blue link text below the Clone Project button
element_hints.Sign Out: Red sign-out icon button in the account popover
element_hints.Project Name: Text input field with placeholder 'Enter a project name' on BI project creation form
element_hints.Library Name: Text input field with placeholder 'Enter a library name' on BI library creation form
element_hints.Create Project: Primary colored submit button at bottom-right of the BI project creation form
element_hints.Create Library: Primary colored submit button at bottom-right of the BI library creation form
element_hints.URL of the target service:: This is the sub-label for the Url field. Use it as an anchor to find the input box directly below it.
element_hints.Path: Smart input field for URL path. Often has a 'Path segment' sub-label.

Return expression.label: Return expression
Return expression.hint: Text input field in the return node configuration. Located to the RIGHT of the 'Return expression' label.
Return expression.note: Smart input field for expressions. Search constrained to right side of label only.

Expression.label: Expression
Expression.note: Smart input in Return node. Use 'fx' icon as anchor — small clean bbox, right beside the Expression input.

element_hints.Url: Smart input field in action configuration. Features a 'Text/Expression' toggle. The input box is the large rectangular area BELOW the 'URL of the target service' sub-label.
element_hints.Url*: Same as 'Url' field. The asterisk indicates it is required.
element_hints.URL of the target service:: This is the sub-label for the Url field. Use it as an anchor to find the input box directly below it.
element_hints.Path: Smart input field for URL path. Often has a 'Path segment' sub-label.
element_hints.Return expression: Text input field in the return node configuration. Located to the RIGHT of the 'Return expression' label.
element_hints.Select Integration Path: Directory selector in the MI creation form (same as Select Path on BI form). Has a 'Select Path' browse button.

field_placeholders.description: Placeholder or pre-filled text visible inside each input field. OCR can find this text to locate the input box directly.

fields.Select Path: Enter path or browse to select a folder...

autofocus_fields.description: Fields that receive focus automatically — user can type without clicking

fields.label: Integration Name
fields.note: First field on screen, gets focus on page load. Type immediately.

fields.label: Folder Name
fields.note: Gets focus when it appears (checkbox checked). Type immediately after checking the checkbox.

fields.label: Service Base Path
fields.note: Already focused when the form opens. Select all (Cmd+A) to clear pre-filled '/' then paste value.

fields.label: Resource Path
fields.note: Auto-focused when Add Resource dialog opens. Select all to clear pre-filled '/path' then paste value.

auto_populated_fields.description: Fields that get values filled automatically from other fields or API

fields.label: Package Name
fields.behavior: Updates live as user types in Integration Name. Lowercased, sanitized.

fields.label: Artifact Id
fields.behavior: Mirrors Integration Name, kept in sync via react-hook-form watch()

fields.label: Select Path
fields.behavior: Pre-filled on mount with current workspace path. Can be changed via Browse or manual typing.

fields.label: Select Integration Path
fields.behavior: Pre-filled with current workspace path on mount. MI form uses this label instead of 'Select Path'.

fields.label: WSO2 Integrator: MI runtime version
fields.behavior: Pre-filled with latest supported MI version from API
